title: Pleurostima cylindrica
taxonomy: Pleurostima cylindrica is a type of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae. It belongs to the genus Pleurostima, which is a group of plants endemic to the tropical regions. The species is further classified into the order Caryophyllales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The family Phytolaccaceae is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants, known as the angiosperms. The classification of Pleurostima cylindrica reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
